title: KMIP KB document front matter
description: YAML front-matter contract for every knowledge-base document. Validated by scripts/build_kb_scaffold.py --check.

title.description: Human-readable document title (the spec section title).

category.description: Which knowledge-base section this document belongs to.

spec_version.description: Baseline KMIP version this stub was generated from (e.g. "2.1").

spec_versions.description: KMIP versions in which this concept appears. Populated during authoring.

source_section.description: Dotted v2.1 (baseline) spec section number for traceability ONLY (e.g. "6.1.8"). Never copy spec prose. Empty string allowed for non-section docs (index pages). The sentinel "del_v2" marks a doc whose feature was removed in v2.0 — its last-present section lives in v1_source_section.

v1_source_section.description: Dotted v1.x spec section number for the same concept, when it existed in the 1.x family (e.g. "3.35"). Optional: omitted for features introduced in v2.x, which have no v1 mapping.

status.description: stub = generated skeleton, prose pending; draft = authored, needs review; reviewed = human-verified per CONTRIBUTING checklist.

related.description: Slugs or titles of related KB documents (cross-references).
